sections.body: The following tasks and deadlines have been identified based on servicer correspondence and court orders. Immediate attention is required for the servicer transition effective April 1, 2026, as well as updates regarding payoff amounts, billing, and court-imposed deadlines.

sections.body: This section outlines all upcoming deadlines, filing requirements, and scheduled hearings as ordered by the Court for this matter. All listed requirements are mandatory and must be completed within their respective timeframes to ensure compliance and avoid possible sanctions.

blocks.notes: Failure to appear may result in sanctions, including striking of pleadings.
blocks.title: Case Management Conference

fields.value: Courtroom 5-3, Miami-Dade County Courthouse, 73 W Flagler St, Miami, FL 33130

citations.claim: A Case Management Conference is set for April 22, 2026 at 10:00 AM before the Honorable Judge Patricia Navarro. All parties shall appear.

spans.raw_text:
1. A Case Management Conference is set for April 22, 2026 at
10:00 AM before the Honorable Judge Patricia Navarro,
Courtroom 5-3, Miami-Dade County Courthouse,
73 W Flagler St, Miami, FL 33130.
2. All parties shall appear. Failure to appear may result in
sanctions, including striking of pleadings.

action_items: Ensure all parties are prepared and present for the conference.

blocks.notes: Failure to timely file may impact proceedings.
blocks.title: Plaintiff Case Management Report Filing Deadline

fields.value: Current status of service on all defendants, any pending motions, estimated time to trial readiness, and whether mediation has been attempted or scheduled.

citations.claim: Plaintiff shall file a Case Management Report no later than ten (10) days prior to the conference. The report shall include: current status of service on all defendants, any pending motions, estimated time to trial readiness, and whether mediation has been attempted or scheduled.

spans.raw_text:
3. Plaintiff shall file a Case Management Report no later than
ten (10) days prior to the conference. The report shall
include:
a. Current status of service on all defendants
b. Any pending motions
c. Estimated time to trial readiness
d. Whether mediation has been attempted or scheduled

action_items: File the Case Management Report with the Court by the stated deadline, ensuring all required topics are addressed.

blocks.notes: Proof of service must be filed with the Court no later than April 15, 2026.

the Court no later than April 15, 2026.

action_items: Ensure all proof of service documents are filed with the Court by the deadline.

73 W Flagler St, Miami, FL 33130.
2. All parties shall appear. Failure to appear may result in

citations.claim: Deadline for Plaintiff to file Case Management Report is April 12, 2026, including specific required elements.

sections.body: The current payoff amount for the subject loan is $490,527.44 as of March 22, 2026. This reflects an increase from the prior quoted payoff of $487,920.00 as of March 1, 2026, due to accrued interest, late charges, and a corporate advance relating to force-placed hazard insurance posted on March 18.

blocks.notes: Payoff updated from $487,920.00 (March 1, 2026) to $490,527.44 (March 22, 2026) to reflect accrued interest, late charges, and corporate advances for force-placed insurance.
blocks.title: Current Payoff Details

citations.claim: The current payoff amount is $490,527.44 as of March 22, 2026.

spans.raw_text:
Please note that the payoff amount has been revised. The current
payoff is now $490,527.44 as of March 22, 2026 (up from $487,920.00
quoted on March 15). The increase reflects accrued interest, late
charges, and a corporate advance posted on March 18 for force-placed
hazard insurance that our prior quote did not include.

citations.claim: Previous payoff amount was $487,920.00 as of March 1, 2026.

spans.raw_text: The updated payoff amount as of March 1, 2026 is $487,920.00. Please update your recor

citations.claim: Instructions to disregard prior figures and use the new total in all authorizations.

spans.raw_text:
Please disregard the earlier $487,920 figure. All fee authorizations
and billing should reference the new total going forward.

action_items: Reference only the updated payoff of $490,527.44 in all fee authorizations and billing.

sections.body: This section outlines the recent transfer of servicing responsibilities for the subject loan and identifies the borrower's retained counsel.

blocks.notes: All correspondence, billing submissions, and status reports after April 1, 2026, must be directed to Mr. Cooper. Any pending fee authorizations with Wells Fargo require resubmission to Mr. Cooper.
blocks.title: Servicing Transfer

fields.value: Nationstar Mortgage LLC d/b/a Mr. Cooper

citations.claim: Effective April 1, 2026, servicing of the above-referenced loan transfers from Wells Fargo to Nationstar Mortgage LLC d/b/a Mr. Cooper. All correspondence after that date should be directed to Mr. Cooper.

sections.body: The following title concerns have been identified based on the available evidence, including property tax liens, a recorded mortgage and its assignment, association claims, and specific easements and covenants affecting the property at 15201 SW 88th Ave, Palmetto Bay, FL 33157.

blocks.notes: Property taxes for 2025 are a lien on the property but not yet due or payable as of the current report.
blocks.title: 2025 Property Tax Lien (Not Yet Due)

citations.claim: Property taxes for 2025 are a lien on the property but not yet due or payable as of the current report. Amount: $8,247.00.

spans.raw_text:
1. Property taxes and assessments for the year 2025 and subsequent years,
which are a lien but not yet due and payable.
Amount: $8,247.00
Tax Parcel No.: 33-5022-014-0290

blocks.notes: Mortgage was originally with Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. and assigned to Nationstar Mortgage LLC d/b/a Mr. Cooper by recorded assignment on September 14, 2025 (Instrument No. 2025-0891234).
blocks.title: Active Mortgage and Assignment of Mortgage

citations.claim: Mortgage from Carlos A. Rodriguez to Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. originally for $445,000.00, dated February 8, 2021, and recorded February 15, 2021 (Instrument No. 2021-0123456).

spans.raw_text:

original amount of $445,000.00 dated February 8, 2021 and recorded
February 15, 2021 as Instrument No. 2021-0123456 in the Official
Records of Miami-Dade County, Florida.
